name: Sun-Sational Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, flour, lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add three eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Beat in the remaining egg white. Set aside.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 325°F for another 10 minutes.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Remove from the pan and cool before serving.
9. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Stir in water and lemon juice until clear and thickened.
10. Add a small amount of hot mixture to slightly beaten egg yolk. Return to the hot mixture and cook for 3 minutes while stirring constantly.
11. Cool slightly, then spoon over the cheesecake and chill.
